texto: She can't have understood you: you are so utterly different from ordinary men. That's what I liked about you when I first saw you
autor: I felt at once that you weren't like everybody else.
explicacao: Citação de I felt at once that you weren't like everybody else. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “She can't have understood you: you are so utterly different from ordinary men. That's what I like…” articula reflexao, marcel-proust, swann-s-way em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como swann-s-way.
